prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `332efdb3`.
codex_response:
Implemented `task_332efdb3`. The rule is: ignore input contents except grid shape, fill the whole output with `1`, then set every cell at odd row and odd column indices to `0`, producing the regular perforated pattern. The summary hint was used; it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` was needed. No new primitive was added.

Key files are [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_332efdb3/__init__.py#L5), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_332efdb3/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_332efdb3/generator.py#L9). The verifier passed `4/4` official examples, and the generated set passed `900/900` generated-example checks.

Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/332efdb3/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/332efdb3/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/332efdb3/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/332efdb3/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/332efdb3/previews/preview_03.png). I visually checked [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/332efdb3/previews/preview_01.png); it now starts with large odd squares and near-square blanks, which is closer to the official family.

One constraint: the repo’s grid validator hard-caps grids at `30x30`, and this task’s blank-input family only permits `900` unique zero-filled shapes under that cap, so [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_332efdb3/__init__.py#L6) sets `MAX_EXAMPLES = 900`. That is why the shared build invoked with `--n-examples 1000` produced `900` examples instead of `1000`.
